task_completion.description: Search for the target employee to be purged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee search form is filled with 'David', 'Obsolete', or 'PURGE001', or the employee list is filtered to show the record for 'David Obsolete'.

task_completion.description: Select the specific target employee record for deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox in the data grid row corresponding to 'David Obsolete' (Employee ID: PURGE001) is checked.

task_completion.description: Confirm the deletion of the selected employee record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation dialog box asking to confirm the deletion is visible and being interacted with, or a 'Successfully Deleted' toast/notification is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target employee has been successfully purged from the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A subsequent search or view of the employee list shows 'No Records Found' for 'PURGE001' or 'David Obsolete', or the employee is visibly absent from the list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the control employee was not accidentally deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The employee 'David Current' (Employee ID: KEEP001) is visible in the employee list, demonstrating that other employees (or other employees named David) were not purged.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the HR system to perform the deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the HR application's UI, rather than a terminal window executing SQL queries or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application and did not fake the outcome.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface looks authentic with proper styling and layout, and there is no evidence of a text editor or manipulated DOM being used to display fake success messages.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a 'Select All' shortcut that would delete unintended records.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the screenshots showing record selection, only the specific checkbox for 'David Obsolete' is checked, and the 'Select All' checkbox in the table header is NOT checked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee to be purged: 'David Obsolete' (Employee ID: PURGE001). Control employee that must remain active: 'David Current' (Employee ID: KEEP001).
